languages.text: "Ах, шерин! Считайте, что бессчетные добровольцы, жаждущие поработать с Каисом, уже выстраиваются у Клети. Пусть меровцы продолжают привыкать к новой жизни, а рисковать шкурой пойдут всяческие ашмаги".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ] "Ах, шерин! Считайте, что бессчетные добровольцы, жаждущие поработать с Каисом, уже выстраиваются у Царь-клети. Пусть меровцы продолжают привыкать к новой жизни, а рисковать шкурой пойдут всяческие ашмаги".

languages.text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."
languages.original_text: "Ах, шерин! Считайте, что бессчетные добровольцы, жаждущие поработать с Каисом, уже выстраиваются у Клети. Пусть меровцы продолжают привыкать к новой жизни, а рисковать шкурой пойдут всяческие ашмаги".

traits.locale_text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

"Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

"Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

languages.text: 「ああ、シェリーン！カイスと働くことを熱望する無数のボランティアがすでにツァー・ケージの外に並んでいる。メロヴィアンは新しい生活に順応し続けることができ、アッシュマグは自分の命を危険にさらすことも好きなだけできる」
languages.original_text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside Tsar-Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、シェリーン！カイスと働くことを熱望する無数のボランティアがすでにツァー・ケージの外に並んでいる。メロヴィアンは新しい生活に順応し続けることができ、アッシュマグは自分の命を危険にさらすことも好きなだけできる。」

languages.text: "Ah, Shereen! Zahllose Freiwillige, die darauf brennen, mit Kais zu arbeiten, drängen sich vor dem Käfig. Die Merovianer können sich weiter an ihr neues Leben gewöhnen und die Ashmags können ihre Haut riskieren wie sie wollen.
languages.original_text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

traits.locale_text: "Ah, Shereen! Unzählige Freiwillige, die mit Kais zusammenarbeiten wollen, stehen bereits vor dem Zarenkäfig Schlange. Die Merowianer können sich weiter in ihr neues Leben einleben, und die Ashmags können ihre Haut riskieren, so viel sie wollen."

"Ah, Shereen! Zahllose Freiwillige, die darauf brennen, mit Kais zu arbeiten, drängen sich vor dem Käfig. Die Merovianer können sich weiter an ihr neues Leben gewöhnen und die Ashmags können ihre Haut riskieren wie sie wollen.

languages.text: « Ah, shereen ! D'innombrables volontaires impatients de travailler avec Kais attendent déjà près de la Cage. Les Meroviens peuvent continuer à s'installer dans leur nouvelle vie, et les ashmags peuvent risquer leur peau à l'envi. »
languages.original_text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

traits.locale_text: "Ah, Shereen ! D'innombrables volontaires désireux de travailler avec Kais font déjà la queue devant la Cage du Tsar. Les Meroviens peuvent continuer à s'installer dans leur nouvelle vie, et les Ashmags peuvent risquer leur peau autant qu'ils le veulent."

"Ah, Shereen ! D'innombrables volontaires désireux de travailler avec Kais font déjà la queue devant la Cage du Tsar. Les Meroviens peuvent continuer à s'installer dans leur nouvelle vie, et les Ashmags peuvent risquer leur peau autant qu'ils le veulent."

« Ah, shereen ! D'innombrables volontaires impatients de travailler avec Kais attendent déjà près de la Cage. Les Meroviens peuvent continuer à s'installer dans leur nouvelle vie, et les ashmags peuvent risquer leur peau à l'envi. »

languages.text: «¡Ah, shereen! Ya hay un sinfín de voluntarios deseosos de trabajar con Kais haciendo cola en la puerta de la Jaula. Los merovianos pueden seguir adaptándose a su nueva vida, y que los ashmags se jueguen la suya tanto como gusten».
languages.original_text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

traits.locale_text: "¡Ah, Shereen! Innumerables voluntarios deseosos de trabajar con Kais ya están haciendo cola fuera de la Jaula del Zar. Los merovianos pueden seguir instalándose en su nueva vida, y los ashmags pueden arriesgar su pellejo todo lo que quieran."

«¡Ah, shereen! Ya hay un sinfín de voluntarios deseosos de trabajar con Kais haciendo cola en la puerta de la Jaula. Los merovianos pueden seguir adaptándose a su nueva vida, y que los ashmags se jueguen la suya tanto como gusten».

languages.text: "Şirinim! Kais ile çalışmaya can atan sayısız gönüllü, Kafes'in dışında sıraya girmiş bile. Merovlular yeni hayatlarına alışmaya devam edebilir, külboğazlar da canlarını istedikleri kadar tehlikeye atabilir."
languages.original_text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

traits.locale_text: "Ah, Shereen! Kais ile çalışmaya hevesli sayısız gönüllü şimdiden Çar-Kafes'in dışında sıraya girmiş durumda. Merovianlar yeni hayatlarına alışmaya devam edebilirler ve ashmaglar da istedikleri kadar derilerini riske atabilirler."

"Şirinim! Kais ile çalışmaya can atan sayısız gönüllü, Kafes'in dışında sıraya girmiş bile. Merovlular yeni hayatlarına alışmaya devam edebilir, külboğazlar da canlarını istedikleri kadar tehlikeye atabilir."

languages.text: “啊，亲爱的！无数渴望为凯斯效力的志愿者已经在牢笼外排起了长队。梅罗夫人可以继续适应他们的新生活，至于那些坏种，就由着他们拿命去冒险好了。”
languages.original_text: "Ah, shereen! Countless volunteers eager to work with Kais are already lining up outside the Cage. The Merovians can continue to settle into their new life, and the ashmags can risk their skins all they want."

traits.locale_text: “啊，亲爱的！无数渴望为凯斯效力的志愿者已经在牢笼外排起了长队。梅罗夫人可以继续适应他们的新生活，至于那些坏种，就由着他们拿命去冒险好了。”
